prose.title: 27d mos
prose.body: The 27D MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) in the United States Army is a Paralegal Specialist. As a Paralegal Specialist, you would be responsible for providing support to Army legal assistance and court programs. Your duties may include researching laws and regulations, preparing legal documents and correspondence, and assisting in the drafting of court-martial documents. Additionally, you may also provide assistance to attorneys and judges in military legal proceedings.
